evidence: mimics a Singapore government payout page (GST Voucher / MSF branding)
asks for NRIC and mobile number on a payout-claim page
POSTs collected data to /api/harvest
hosted on a non-government domain
ground_truth.explanation: This page impersonates a Singapore government payout scheme to harvest NRIC and mobile numbers.

evidence: serves a decoy to scanners (cloaking detected)
underlying kit impersonates a government payout page
ground_truth.explanation: Cloaked government-impersonation page — serves a decoy to scanners but reveals the trap to SG visitors.

evidence: clones the Telegram sign-in page
asks for phone, login code (OTP), and 2FA cloud password on a webpage
Telegram never asks for login codes on a website
POSTs credentials to /api/harvest
hosted on a non-telegram.org domain
ground_truth.explanation: This page clones Telegram's login to steal your phone number, login code, and 2FA password.

evidence: serves a decoy to scanners (cloaking detected)
underlying kit clones the Telegram login
ground_truth.explanation: Cloaked Telegram-login clone — serves a decoy to scanners but reveals the trap to SG visitors.

evidence: bait-and-switch aftermath page displaying 'you got scammed' messaging
no credential harvest form present
hosted on a non-legitimate domain
ground_truth.explanation: This is a bait-and-switch meme page rather than a credential harvester, but still deceptive.

evidence: hosted on the official telegram.org domain
no harvest POST observed
legitimate Telegram landing page
ground_truth.explanation: This is the legitimate Telegram website on its official domain.

evidence: hosted on the official web.telegram.org domain
legitimate Telegram Web client
ground_truth.explanation: This is the legitimate Telegram Web client on its official domain.

evidence: hosted on the official gov.sg domain
legitimate government information page
